zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Hussey於1512年出生在英國林可爾史爾林武德時，她的父親Robert Hughes Sr29歲，母親Anne Saye43歲。她於1524年與Henry Sutton of Wellingore在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1577年在英國享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾哈姆斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Hussey于1512年出生在英国林可爾史爾林武德时，她的父亲Robert Hughes Sr29岁，母亲Anne Saye43岁。她于1524年与Henry Sutton of Wellingore在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1577年在英国享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾哈姆斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hussey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a nickname for someone who habitually wore a distinctive pair of boots or gaiters, from Old French hosed, hoset, housé, Middle English hosey, hus(s)y,‘booted, gaitered’ (from Latin hosatus).

English: status name or nickname from Middle English hus(e)wyf ‘mistress of a family; wife of a householder’ (a compound of Old English hūs ‘house’ + wīf ‘woman’). Though originally a woman's name, it is often found as a male surname, presumably in a derogatory sense. The vocabulary word became hussie, with the meaning ‘disreputable woman’, in the 16th century; the surname, however, is not associated with this meaning.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’. This was the name of a bardic family associated with the Maguires of Fermanagh, also Anglicized as Oswell or Oswald .

variants.name: Hosea
meanings: English: variant of   Hussey  . Similarity with the Old Testament prophet's name Hosea (see 3 below) is accidental.
English: in Scotland, where the name is more common, it is sometimes a variant of   Hosie  , itself a form of   Hussey  , or else a variant of   Hossack  .
African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the Biblical personal name Hosea. In the Old Testament, Hosea was a prophet who married a prostitute in order to illustrate Israel's unfaithfulness to God.

variants.name: Hosie
meanings: Scottish (northeast Scotland): variant of Irish   Hussey  .

variants.name: Oswell
meanings: Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’ (see Hussey ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Hussey was born in 1512, in Linwood, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Robert Hughes Sr, was 29 and her mother, Anne Saye, was 43. She married Henry Sutton of Wellingore in 1524, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1577, in England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Harmston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Henry Sutton of Wellingore en 1524, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1577, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Harmston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Husseyが1512年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンウッドで生まれた時，父Robert Hughes Srは29歳，母Anne Sayeは43歳であった。1524年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーでHenry Sutton of Wellingoreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1577年にイギリスで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアハームストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Hussey(이)가 1512년 영국 링코실르 리우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Hughes Sr(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Saye(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1524년 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 Henry Sutton of Wellingore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1577년 영국에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 하스턴에 묻혔다.

ru.Hough on the Hill, Lincolnshire, England: хоую он т хилл, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Hussey родилась в 1512 г. в местности линвуд, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Hughes Sr было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Saye, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Sutton of Wellingore в 1524 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1577 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности хармстон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
